title: Humanoid robotics and RobotOps market signal
why_it_matters: Embodied automation connects AI agents, logistics, industrial workflows, safety, and company strategy. It is a useful signal for moving from software agents to RobotOps systems.
actionable_opportunity: Prototype Ω-RobotOps-T as a warehouse/factory workflow simulator with agent supervision, safety checks, and unit-economics assumptions.

oak_check.risk: Market claims around humanoid robotics can be strongly promotional, especially around financing or public-market narratives.
oak_check.limit: Treat this as a market-signal candidate, not proof of deployment scale or profitability.
oak_check.falsification_route: Verify customers, deployments, safety records, unit economics, and financing details from primary or high-quality sources before creating a product issue.
oak_check.m_minus_warning: Do not confuse robotics fundraising or SPAC narratives with validated operational value.

sources.title: Source verification required: humanoid robotics market item mentioned in chat briefing

next_action: Verify the robotics market source and create a dry-run RobotOps issue only if deployments and economics are credible.
business_funding_signal: Potential service/product angle for robotics workflow simulation and operational OAK evaluation.
